displayNameZh: Distribution 怎么解决？真正困难的地方
summary: Yt Distribution Hard component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「Distribution 怎么解决？真正困难的地方」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-distribution-hard/src/YtDistributionHard.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtDistributionHard` and `ytDistributionHardDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Distribution Hard Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-distribution-hard to my project. Preserve the exported YtDistributionHardProps API and register the YtDistributionHard composition with the default props.
